subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God, Who hath sent down the verses and made manifest the clear proofs, and hath dispatched the Messengers for the guidance of His creation, that they may know Him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی انزل الایات و اظهر البینات و ارسل الرسل لهدایه خلقه لیعرفهم
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @purpose; goal of creation, @Muhammad; Islam, @exhortations and counsels, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
